brief_summary: 4×2 grid of variant cells. Four rows (Bimorphis, Shigan, Eviscera, Optigon) crossed against two columns (Kawa, Guro). Each cell is a fuchsia-tinted circle (Kawa lighter, Guro slightly darker) representing one discrete artisan variant. Footnote underlines that each cell is its own cast / pigment / QC pass. Caption: 'four days to commit · eight artisans to choose from'.
data_sources: gsk-sweet-nightmare-group-buy.mdx § 'Four colorways, two finishes, half a week' — 'Bimorphis, Shigan, Eviscera, and Optigon are the colorways; Kawa and Guro are the finishes ... Each variant is a discrete artisan ... A resin artisan run amortizes nothing across the matrix — each colorway-finish combination is its own cast, its own pigment mix, its own QC pass.'
